chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Criminal Miscellaneous Application No.S-223 of 2017 Date of hearing: 10.11.2017. Date of Decision: 10.11.2017. Applicant: Through Akhtar Ali Abro, Advocate. Applicant is also present. Respondents No.1,2&3: Through Syed Meeral Shah, Additional Prosecutor General, Sindh. Respondents No.4: Through Mr. Shouban Ali Pahore Advocate. Respondent No.4 is also present. O R D E R Through instant criminal miscellaneous application, the applicant seeks custody of minors Ali Raza, aged 08 years, Shaista aged 05 years and Shoaib aged 02 years. 2. By consent, the custody of minors namely Shaista aged about 05 years and Shoaib aged about 02 years is handed over to the applicant who however, shall reside in her parents’ house in Village Piyaro Station, Taluka & District Dadu where the house of respondent No.4 is also situated. Whereas, the custody of alleged detainee No.1 Ali Raza shall remain with respondent No.4 Zafar Ali, who is her father. 3. However, it is made clear that the custody of minors as ordered above is an interim arrangement. For proper custody of minors, both the parties are at liberty to file application under relevant provisions of Guardians & Wards Act, 1890 before the concerned Court which shall decide the same without being influenced by the order of this Court. Criminal miscellaneous application stands disposed of. JUDGE *Abdullah Channa/P.S*
